name: Post Type Classify
purpose: Classify post type using LLM. Determines extraction strategy.
design_intent: Affiliate/promo/comparison posts need DIFFERENT handling. Classifier runs FIRST. Rule-based cannot detect post intent.
change_impact: New mandatory stage. All downstream stages depend on postType classification.

affiliate.definition: Post refers to external vendor (GamsGo, AllKeyShop)

promo_code.definition: Post advertising discount code, no direct pricing

comparison.definition: Post compares official price vs vendor price
comparison.extraction: Extract OFFER price, not reference price.

unknown.extraction: Proceed with caution, flag for review

llm_config.prompt_strategy: Single-pass classification with structured JSON output

processing_rules.step_1: Receive clean title + body from Stage 0
processing_rules.step_6: Set downstream skip conditions based on postType

skip_impact.comparison: Stage 3 must extract OFFER price, not reference.

test_cases.name: Bloated marketing
test_cases.input: Title: 최저가 보장! 정식 사업자! 가족계정!

acceptance_criteria: Promo code posts skip extraction pipeline
Comparison posts extract offer price only
Test cases TC-1.1 through TC-1.5 pass
critical_note: Rule-based Cheerio CANNOT classify post intent. Marketing bloated titles require high-dimensional thinking. LLM is mandatory.
